properties.name: jwt.secret
properties.description: Base64-encoded secret used to sign JWT tokens.

properties.name: jwt.access-token-expiration-ms
properties.description: Access token expiration time in milliseconds.

properties.name: jwt.refresh-token-expiration-ms
properties.description: Refresh token expiration time in milliseconds.

properties.name: vserv.cors.allowed-origins
properties.description: Comma-separated list of allowed origins for CORS.

properties.name: resend.api.key
properties.description: API key used to authenticate with Resend.

properties.name: resend.api.base-url
properties.description: Base URL for the Resend API.

properties.name: resend.sender.email
properties.description: Default sender email address for outbound emails.

properties.name: resend.sender.name
properties.description: Default sender display name for outbound emails.

properties.name: razorpay.currency
properties.description: Default currency used for Razorpay orders.

properties.name: razorpay.company-name
properties.description: Display company name used in Razorpay checkout metadata.
